narrative:
Huber Heights 2-A (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,096 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.5 percentage points.
